title: Immingham open cycle gas turbine: non-material change, Planning Act 2008
body: "Decision by the Secretary of State on an application for a non-material change relating to an electricity generating station comprising an open cycle gas turbine power station.  Date of decision  22 May 2025  Company / location   VPI Immingham B LimitedImminghamNorth East Lincolnshire   Type of project  Non-material consent under the Planning Act 2008. "

taxons.title: Energy industry and infrastructure licensing and regulation
